rationale: TokenKey-local registry of upstream Wei-Shaw/sub2api issues that this fork has already addressed. Use this when triaging upstream open issues so already-fixed upstream reports are not repeatedly selected for TokenKey work.

issues.summary: Preserved captured real Claude CLI User-Agent and X-Stainless fingerprint values when applying mimicry defaults, avoiding version downgrade churn.
OpenAI /responses account testing requires a terminal response.completed/response.done event; early EOF before completion fails the account test.
Manual/successful recovery clears account rate-limit state, model rate limits, temporary unschedulable state, and OpenAI 403 counters.
Channel interval pricing applies flat channel defaults as the explicit out-of-range fallback, preventing custom-model requests from billing at zero.
Disabled proxies are filtered out of account preload and WithProxy edge loads while preserving account ProxyID bindings for admin visibility.
Streaming usage billing continues on detached/drained upstream paths when clients disconnect early, preventing zero-cost early-disconnect abuse.
OpenAI scheduling now queries account_groups for the requested group, so grouped balance traffic should not select ungrouped accounts.
OpenAI burst 429s below Codex usage-window limits use the short fallback cooldown instead of multi-hour or multi-day reset headers.
GPT-5.4/5.5 long-context billing includes cache_read tokens in the threshold and applies the long-context multiplier to cache_read cost.
OpenAI OAuth image generation uses a detached upstream context, so long non-stream image jobs are not tied to client disconnect/cancel.
Anthropic-to-OpenAI multi-turn tool call conversion preserves tool-call/call-id continuity for tool_result history.
OpenAI usage recording tracks billing-model candidates and source selection so mapped and unmapped model billing paths are covered.
Sticky-session scheduling has dedicated hash, strategy, TTL refresh, and invalidation logic for OpenAI-compatible account selection.
Expired and non-active subscriptions are ignored by reassignment existence checks, preventing stale rows from causing validity_days_mismatch conflicts.
Codex OAuth forwarding strips temperature and other ChatGPT-internal unsupported parameters before dispatch.
Stopped emitting or forwarding x-stainless-helper-method on Claude Code OAuth mimicry paths.
OpenAI /compact route handling and request-body normalization are implemented, with compact_not_supported when no compatible account is available.

Non-stream /v1/chat/completions and /v1/messages buffered handlers explicitly set Content-Type: application/json after WriteFilteredHeaders, preventing the upstream Responses SSE Content-Type from leaking onto a JSON body.
fixCallIDPrefix rewrites call_<id> tool-call ids as fc_<id> (with underscore), matching the codex backend id validator and avoiding 502 on multi-hop tool turns under OAuth.

normalizeClaudeOAuthRequestBody skips context_management auto-injection for Haiku models, mirroring the existing Haiku exemption in FullClaudeCodeMimicryBetas; Anthropic otherwise returns 400 for claude-haiku-4-5-* when thinking.type is enabled.
